name: Baked Chicken with Provolone & Ziti
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Prego sauce or your own
Ziti, as much as you think you will eat!
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts in a baking pan sprayed with non-stick spray.
2. Sprinkle herbs on top of the chicken breasts.
3. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour.
4. Meanwhile, heat the sauce and cook ziti separately (follow box instructions).
5. Once the ziti is cooked and drained, add it to the sauce in a separate baking dish sprayed with non-stick spray. Add a pat of margarine or butter and mix well.
6. Pour into another 1 1/2-quart sprayed baking dish.
7. When the chicken is finished baking, place it on top of the ziti and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Pour sauce over everything and place slices of provolone cheese on top.
9. Place under broiler until cheese is melted and bubbly.
